category_sources: source_facts.description says snipe eBay auctions from the command line; official SourceForge homepage calls esniper a simple lightweight tool for sniping eBay auctions.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is esniper; official SourceForge homepage heading is esniper.
docs_sources: Official homepage is the best available documentation surface and links users to the manual page and SourceForge project resources.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official SourceForge project references its Git repository as git://git.code.sf.net/p/esniper/code-git and shows Git as the project source-control area.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official homepage identify eBay auction sniping; official homepage notes development stopped in 2020, supporting legacy tag.
